default.speaker: Jake
default.text: Jake. I'm the toughest kid at camp. Don't forget it.

default.speaker: Jake
default.text: I collect stuff. Rocks, coins, anything shiny. Check out this coin my dad brought from Israel.

default.speaker: Pink Panther
default.text: That's a beautiful coin. Where exactly is it from?

default.speaker: Jake
default.text: Some old city with tunnels underneath. Jerusalem, I think. Dad said the tunnels are ANCIENT.

post.speaker: Jake
post.text: Don't touch my collection. I'm watching you.

strange.speaker: Jake
strange.text: I keep hearing echoes. Like tunnels underground. Voices bouncing off stone walls.

strange.speaker: Jake
strange.text: And I can't stop rubbing every metal surface for symbols. Look at this bench - I KNOW there's something underneath!

strange.speaker: Pink Panther
strange.text: Jake, that's just a wooden bench.

strange.speaker: Jake
strange.text: NO! There are tunnels! Old ones! Under an ancient city! I can FEEL them!

postStrange.speaker: Jake
postStrange.text: The echoes won't stop... tunnels under old stone walls...

postStrange.speaker: Jake
postStrange.text: It's like I can see a huge wall... and something hidden behind it.
